# Sprint 4.3 Compliance And Risk Management

**Sprint:** Sprint 4. Governance Security And Compliance
**Objective:** Implement governance, security, and compliance controls to ensure data protection and regulatory adherence.

## Description
Implement compliance and risk management controls, including data encryption, access controls, and incident response planning.

## Deliverable
Compliance and risk management implementation
